url: "https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012688558-curl.md"
title: "服务人员查询-请求示例-curl"
doc_id: 4012688558
example_lang: "curl"
---

## curl


> GET

```
curl -X GET \
  https://api.mch.weixin.qq.com/v3/smartguide/guides?sub_mchid=1234567890&store_id=1234&userid=robert&&work_id=robert&limit=5&offset=0 \
  -H "Authorization: WECHATPAY2-SHA256-RSA2048 mchid=\"1900000001\",..." \
  -H "Accept: application/json" \
  -H "Wechatpay-Serial: 5157F09EFDC096DE15EBE81A47057A7232F1B8E1"

```
